name: Coldline Company
specialty: Specializing in hazardous expeditions through the rifts, Coldline Company's unique ability to navigate and survive in unstable dimensions sets them apart from other guilds.

members.name: Thaddeus 'Icefist' Vorenus
members.note: A former Tower Authority enforcer with a scarred face and a reputation for cold-blooded efficiency.

members.name: Zephyr Kinslayer
members.note: A taciturn elf known for his keen senses and uncanny ability to find anything, even in the heart of the Undercity.

members.name: Gideon 'Dwarf-Hammer' Stonefist
members.note: A battle-hardened dwarf with a prosthetic arm, earning his nickname by crushing opponents like a hammer.

members.name: Eira Frostwing
members.note: A sleek and seductive tabaxi, known for her silver tongue and charm that can disarm even the toughest of foes.

visual: Dressed in sturdy leather armor, they carry an assortment of exotic weapons and tools. A cold-blue line of light emanates from their foreheads, marking them as a united and formidable force.
reputation_note: Rumored to have made a pact with a powerful entity from the rifts, Coldline Company is feared and respected by all in the Undercity.
